text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Nishino
Flower...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower points toward a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: They're, um... kind of adorable, don't you think?
choice_data_list: Do you want to give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Which ones should I try to get?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I couldn't even get a single one...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's not as easy as it looks, is it? There has to be a
trick to it...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You would really do that for me?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll have to do my best to cheer you on! You
can do it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
